name: codex-vaultwarden-bridge
description: A local Codex plugin for safely using Vaultwarden and Bitwarden CLI credentials.

interface.shortDescription: Use Vaultwarden secrets from Codex without printing them.
interface.longDescription: Vaultwarden Bridge is a local Codex plugin that wraps the Bitwarden CLI, summarizes vault items, prepares temporary SSH keys, adds keys to ssh-agent with a TTL, and runs SSH commands without exposing private keys in chat.
defaultPrompt: Search vault items tagged for Codex SSH.
Run a safe SSH status command by server alias.
